zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN於1177年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 亞琛蒙沙武波高時，他的父親Ulrich I von Berg Schelklingen25歲，母親Udilhild von Ronsberg17歲。他於1209年與Adelheid von Schelklingen在德國薩辛桑格豪森沃史泰特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1239年6月12日在他的家鄉享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN于1177年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 亞琛蒙沙武波高时，他的父亲Ulrich I von Berg Schelklingen25岁，母亲Udilhild von Ronsberg17岁。他于1209年与Adelheid von Schelklingen在德国薩辛桑格豪森沃史泰特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1239年6月12日在他的家乡享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: VON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN was born in 1177, in Burgau, Monschau, Kreis Aachen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Ulrich I von Berg Schelklingen, was 25 and his mother, Udilhild von Ronsberg, was 17. He married Adelheid von Schelklingen in 1209, in Voigtstedt, Sangerhausen, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 12 June 1239, in his hometown, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN est né en 1177, à Burgau, Monschau, Kreis Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Ulrich I von Berg Schelklingen, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Udilhild von Ronsberg, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid von Schelklingen en 1209, à Voigtstedt, Sangerhausen, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1239, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN 1177 in Burgau, Monschau, Kreis Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ulrich I von Berg Schelklingen 25 und seine Mutter Udilhild von Ronsberg 17. Er hat 1209 in Voigtstedt, Sangerhausen, Sachsen, Deutschland Adelheid von Schelklingen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juni 1239 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN è nato il nel 1177 nel Burgau, Monschau, Kreis Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Ulrich I von Berg Schelklingen, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Udilhild von Ronsberg, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Adelheid von Schelklingen nel 1209, nel Voigtstedt, Sangerhausen, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 giugno 1239, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGENが1177年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス アーチェンモンスチャウブルガウで生まれた時，父Ulrich I von Berg Schelklingenは25歳，母Udilhild von Ronsbergは17歳であった。1209年にドイツサチセンサンジャーハウセンボイグトステトでAdelheid von Schelklingenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1239年6月12日に故郷で62歳で死去した。

ko.Burgau, Aachen, Nordrheim-Westfalen, Ger: 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 아악헨 몬샤우 버가
ko.Burgau, Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Ger: 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 아악헨 몬샤우 버가
ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN(이)가 1177년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 아악헨 몬샤우 버가에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ulrich I von Berg Schelklingen(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Udilhild von Ronsberg(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1209년 독일 작센 생르하우센 보익츠테드트에서 Adelheid von Schelklingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1239년 6월 12일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN nasceu em 1177, em Burgau, Monschau, Kreis Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Ulrich I von Berg Schelklingen, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Udilhild von Ronsberg, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid von Schelklingen em 1209, em Voigtstedt, Sangerhausen, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1239, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN родился в 1177 г. в местности бургау, монщао, крис аачэн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Ulrich I von Berg Schelklingen было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Udilhild von Ronsberg, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid von Schelklingen в 1209 г. в местности фоигцтедт, сангираусен, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 12 июня 1239 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN nació en 1177, en Burgau, Monschau, Kreis Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Ulrich I von Berg Schelklingen, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Udilhild von Ronsberg, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Adelheid von Schelklingen en 1209, en Voigtstedt, Sangerhausen, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de junio de 1239, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años.
